subject: Add retry escalation logic to orchestration and SKILL.md
description:
Implement a 3-tier retry escalation strategy for failed tasks that progressively provides more help rather than repeating the same approach.

**What to implement:**

1. Add retry escalation procedures to `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md`:
   - **Retry #1 (Standard)**: Re-launch agent with failure context from previous attempt (existing behavior, enhanced)
   - **Retry #2 (Context Enrichment)**: Inject full `execution_context.md` content + result files from related tasks (same wave or shared dependencies) into retry prompt
   - **Retry #3 (User Escalation)**: Pause execution, present failure details to user via AskUserQuestion with 4 options:
     - "Fix manually and continue" — user fixes externally, execution resumes
     - "Skip this task" — mark as FAIL in task_log.md, continue
     - "Provide guidance" — capture user text, inject into final retry
     - "Abort session" — clean up, present partial summary
   - If user provides guidance: final retry with user guidance injected
   - If that also fails: present AskUserQuestion again with updated failure
   - Track retry escalation level in task_log.md per task
   - Retry count resets for each new task

2. Update `claude/sdd-tools/skills/execute-tasks/SKILL.md`:
   - Add retry escalation step to failure handling workflow
   - Reference orchestration.md for detailed escalation procedures

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md` (~611 lines)
- `claude/sdd-tools/skills/execute-tasks/SKILL.md` (~271 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Retry #1: Standard retry with failure context
- [ ] Retry #2: Context enrichment with full execution_context.md + related results
- [ ] Retry #3: User escalation via AskUserQuestion with 4 options
- [ ] "Fix manually and continue" pauses and resumes
- [ ] "Skip this task" marks FAIL in task_log.md, continues
- [ ] "Provide guidance" captures text, injects into retry
- [ ] "Abort session" cleans up, shows partial summary
- [ ] Retry level tracked in task_log.md per task
- [ ] Retry count resets per task (not cumulative)

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] User provides guidance but retry still fails → re-present AskUserQuestion
- [ ] Multiple tasks fail in same wave → each gets independent escalation
- [ ] Retry #2 succeeds → task passes, no user escalation needed

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] All automated retries exhausted → user must choose action
- [ ] User selects abort → graceful session cleanup

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify escalation logic in orchestration.md is clear
• Integration: Trigger retry with intentionally failing task during e2e (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.9
